title: Hbm's Nuclear Tech - Muddy Edition
description: A mod all about nuclear physics and even nuclear-er explosions, now coming to you in 1.20.1!! Courtesy of your funny lil programmer guy, Mudz ;3
body: **Status:** Alpha **Minecraft Version:** 1.20.1 **Forge Version:** 47.2.20 **Mod ID:** `hbm` **Discord:** [link](https://discord.gg/7TN2p9sxRK) *** ## WARNING > This mod is currently in early alpha stage. Do NOT use it in worlds you care about! There may be bugs, crashes, and potential incompatibilities with other mods. Please report any issues via the GitHub Issues page. Currently NOT PLAYABLE in Survival Mode! > > Forge version 47.4.9 and up is incompatible! You have been warned. > > *** ## About This is my beautiful rewrite of the original [Hbm's Nuclear Tech Mod made by The Bobcat](https://github.com/HbmMods/Hbm-s-Nuclear-Tech-GIT/releases). It aims to bring the entirety of the old 1.7.10 masterpiece to the newest versions of minecraft! No matter how much I have to bang my head against a wall to get it done- ![Me wearing a red hazmat suit and holder filters](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3a3a63bdf81f91ab2ceb2886213256797224bb39.png) *** ## Dependencies [GeckoLib API v4.7.2](https://modrinth.com/mod/geckolib/version/AiVKLYep) ![Requires GeckoLib](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2d0b0d83c26524daa0e6aa67a24d0f059f3ae237.png) ## Suggestions [Just Enough Items v15.8.2.26](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei/version/pFjSVQjG) ## Installation 1. Download the latest version from the [Versions Tab](https://modrinth.com/mod/hbm-ntm-re/versions). 2. Download [GeckoLib](https://modrinth.com/mod/geckolib/version/AiVKLYep). 3. Place both `.jar` files into your Minecrafts `mods` folder. 4. Launch Minecraft with Forge 1.20.1 *** ## Issues and Compatibilities * **Alpha quality:** Expect bugs, missing features, and world corruption. (I try my best to polish the crap outta things before I update, but this warning is a necessary caution, you have been warned!) * **Mod Compatibilities:** This mod has not been tested with other mods. Conflicts may occur. If you encounter bugs, issues, general problems, please report them [here](https://github.com/DirtWithWaterz/hbm-ntm_-_1.20.1_-_47.2.20/issues) with details. ## Contributing Pull requests, suggestions, and bug reports are always appreciated! If you want to help, or even just keep an eye on the project, [join my Discord](https://discord.gg/7TN2p9sxRK). ## Credits * The original mod created by **The Bobcat**. * Hbm's Nuclear Tech - Muddy Edition by me. (**Mudz/DirtWithWaterz**) *** ## Final Thoughts Please understand that I am by no means an expert at programming **java**, this is my first mod, I learn as I go, and go as I learn. Bear with me-
